title: how to send outlook email to a specific group on a board
excerpt: I am new to using Monday.com and using to track recruiting activity.  How can I attach an outlook email for a specific candidate to the candidates name on the board?

posts.author: tarasnee (Tara Snee)
posts.cookedHtml: I am new to using Monday.com and using to track recruiting activity. How can I attach an outlook email for a specific candidate to the candidates name on the board?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @tarasnee - are you using the monday CRM product? If so make sure you are utilizing the Email & Activities function for email tracking. If you are not using CRM, here are some options:

  • Utilize the standard Outlook Integrations for monday to manage the attachment of emails as updates:

    image362×266 10.3 KB

  • Check out the Outlook plugin from E.S.L. for managing connectivity of various Outlook objects directly to monday

  • You can manually copy/paste emails as update for the item or upload the *.EML files into a files column

  • Check out the Email to Board/Item functionality

Hope this helps, and feel free to reach out any time if you need a hand!

Mark
